verses.latin_vulgate: Filius sapiens doctrina patris ;  qui autem illusor est non audit cum arguitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֣ן חָ֭כָם מ֣וּסַר אָ֑ב וְ֝לֵ֗ץ לֹא־שָׁמַ֥ע גְּעָרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: A wise son heareth his father’s instruction: but a scorner heareth not rebuke.

verses.latin_vulgate: De fructu oris sui homo satiabitur bonis :  anima autem prævaricatorum iniqua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִפְּרִ֣י פִי־אִ֭ישׁ יֹ֣אכַל ט֑וֹב וְנֶ֖פֶשׁ בֹּגְדִ֣ים חָמָֽס׃
verses.king_james: A man shall eat good by the fruit of his mouth: but the soul of the transgressors shall eat violence.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui custodit os suum custodit animam suam ;  qui autem inconsideratus est ad loquendum, sentiet mala.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נֹצֵ֣ר פִּ֭יו שֹׁמֵ֣ר נַפְשׁ֑וֹ פֹּשֵׂ֥ק שְׂ֝פָתָ֗יו מְחִתָּה־לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: He that keepeth his mouth keepeth his life: but he that openeth wide his lips shall have destruction.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vult et non vult piger ;  anima autem operantium impinguabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִתְאַוָּ֣ה וָ֭אַיִן נַפְשׁ֣וֹ עָצֵ֑ל וְנֶ֖פֶשׁ חָרֻצִ֣ים תְּדֻשָּֽׁן׃
verses.king_james: The soul of the sluggard desireth, and hath nothing: but the soul of the diligent shall be made fat.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum mendax justus detestabitur ;  impius autem confundit, et confundetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּבַר־שֶׁ֭קֶר יִשְׂנָ֣א צַדִּ֑יק וְ֝רָשָׁ֗ע יַבְאִ֥ישׁ וְיַחְפִּֽיר׃
verses.king_james: A righteous man hateth lying: but a wicked man is loathsome, and cometh to shame.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justitia custodit innocentis viam,  impietas autem peccatorem supplantat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צְ֭דָקָה תִּצֹּ֣ר תׇּם־דָּ֑רֶךְ וְ֝רִשְׁעָ֗ה תְּסַלֵּ֥ף חַטָּֽאת׃
verses.king_james: Righteousness keepeth him that is upright in the way: but wickedness overthroweth the sinner.

verses.latin_vulgate: Est quasi dives, cum nihil habeat,  et est quasi pauper, cum in multis divitiis sit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵ֣שׁ מִ֭תְעַשֵּׁר וְאֵ֣ין כֹּ֑ל מִ֝תְרוֹשֵׁ֗שׁ וְה֣וֹן רָֽב׃
verses.king_james: There is that maketh himself rich, yet hath nothing: there is that maketh himself poor, yet hath great riches.

verses.latin_vulgate: Redemptio animæ viri divitiæ suæ ;  qui autem pauper est, increpationem non sustinet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֣פֶר נֶפֶשׁ־אִ֣ישׁ עׇשְׁר֑וֹ וְ֝רָ֗שׁ לֹא־שָׁמַ֥ע גְּעָרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The ransom of a man’s life are his riches: but the poor heareth not rebuke.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lux justorum lætificat :  lucerna autem impiorum extinguetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוֹר־צַדִּיקִ֥ים יִשְׂמָ֑ח וְנֵ֖ר רְשָׁעִ֣ים יִדְעָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: The light of the righteous rejoiceth: but the lamp of the wicked shall be put out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inter superbos semper jurgia sunt ;  qui autem agunt omnia cum consilio, reguntur sapientia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַק־בְּ֭זָדוֹן יִתֵּ֣ן מַצָּ֑ה וְאֶת־נ֖וֹעָצִ֣ים חׇכְמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Only by pride cometh contention: but with the well advised is wisdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Substantia festinata minuetur ;  quæ autem paulatim colligitur manu, multiplicabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֭וֹן מֵהֶ֣בֶל יִמְעָ֑ט וְקֹבֵ֖ץ עַל־יָ֣ד יַרְבֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: Wealth gotten by vanity shall be diminished: but he that gathereth by labour shall increase.

verses.latin_vulgate: Spes quæ differtur affligit animam ;  lignum vitæ desiderium veniens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹחֶ֣לֶת מְ֭מֻשָּׁכָה מַחֲלָה־לֵ֑ב וְעֵ֥ץ חַ֝יִּ֗ים תַּאֲוָ֥ה בָאָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Hope deferred maketh the heart sick: but when the desire cometh, it is a tree of life.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui detrahit alicui rei, ipse se in futurum obligat ;  qui autem timet præceptum, in pace versabitur.  Animæ dolosæ errant in peccatis :  justi autem misericordes sunt, et miserantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֣ז לְ֭דָבָר יֵחָ֣בֶל ל֑וֹ וִירֵ֥א מִ֝צְוָ֗ה ה֣וּא יְשֻׁלָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Whoso despiseth the word shall be destroyed: but he that feareth the commandment shall be rewarded.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lex sapientis fons vitæ,  ut declinet a ruina mortis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹרַ֣ת חָ֭כָם מְק֣וֹר חַיִּ֑ים לָ֝ס֗וּר מִמֹּ֥קְשֵׁי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.king_james: The law of the wise is a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Doctrina bona dabit gratiam ;  in itinere contemptorum vorago.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֵֽׂכֶל־ט֭וֹב יִתֶּן־חֵ֑ן וְדֶ֖רֶךְ בֹּגְדִ֣ים אֵיתָֽן׃
verses.king_james: Good understanding giveth favour: but the way of transgressors is hard.

verses.latin_vulgate: Astutus omnia agit cum consilio ;  qui autem fatuus est aperit stultitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־עָ֭רוּם יַעֲשֶׂ֣ה בְדָ֑עַת וּ֝כְסִ֗יל יִפְרֹ֥שׂ אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.king_james: Every prudent man dealeth with knowledge: but a fool layeth open his folly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nuntius impii cadet in malum ;  legatus autem fidelis, sanitas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַלְאָ֣ךְ רָ֭שָׁע יִפֹּ֣ל בְּרָ֑ע וְצִ֖יר אֱמוּנִ֣ים מַרְפֵּֽא׃
verses.king_james: A wicked messenger falleth into mischief: but a faithful ambassador is health.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egestas et ignominia ei qui deserit disciplinam ;  qui autem acquiescit arguenti glorificabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֵ֣ישׁ וְ֭קָלוֹן פּוֹרֵ֣עַ מוּסָ֑ר וְשֹׁמֵ֖ר תּוֹכַ֣חַת יְכֻבָּֽד׃
verses.king_james: Poverty and shame shall be to him that refuseth instruction: but he that regardeth reproof shall be honoured.

verses.latin_vulgate: Desiderium si compleatur delectat animam ;  detestantur stulti eos qui fugiunt mala.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּאֲוָ֣ה נִ֭הְיָה תֶּעֱרַ֣ב לְנָ֑פֶשׁ וְתוֹעֲבַ֥ת כְּ֝סִילִ֗ים ס֣וּר מֵרָֽע׃
verses.king_james: The desire accomplished is sweet to the soul: but it is abomination to fools to depart from evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui cum sapientibus graditur sapiens erit ;  amicus stultorum similis efficietur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (הלוך) [הוֹלֵ֣ךְ] אֶת־חֲכָמִ֣ים (וחכם) [יֶחְכָּ֑ם] וְרֹעֶ֖ה כְסִילִ֣ים יֵרֽוֹעַ׃
verses.king_james: He that walketh with wise men shall be wise: but a companion of fools shall be destroyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peccatores persequitur malum,  et justis retribuentur bona.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַ֭טָּאִים תְּרַדֵּ֣ף רָעָ֑ה וְאֶת־צַ֝דִּיקִ֗ים יְשַׁלֶּם־טֽוֹב׃
verses.king_james: Evil pursueth sinners: but to the righteous good shall be repayed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Bonus reliquit hæredes filios et nepotes,  et custoditur justo substantia peccatoris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֗וֹב יַנְחִ֥יל בְּנֵֽי־בָנִ֑ים וְצָפ֥וּן לַ֝צַּדִּ֗יק חֵ֣יל חוֹטֵֽא׃
verses.king_james: A good man leaveth an inheritance to his children’s children: and the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the just.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multi cibi in novalibus patrum,  et aliis congregantur absque judicio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רׇב־אֹ֭כֶל נִ֣יר רָאשִׁ֑ים וְיֵ֥שׁ נִ֝סְפֶּ֗ה בְּלֹ֣א מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.king_james: Much food is in the tillage of the poor: but there is that is destroyed for want of judgment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui parcit virgæ odit filium suum ;  qui autem diligit illum instanter erudit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חוֹשֵׂ֣ךְ שִׁ֭בְטוֹ שׂוֹנֵ֣א בְנ֑וֹ וְ֝אֹהֲב֗וֹ שִׁחֲר֥וֹ מוּסָֽר׃
verses.king_james: He that spareth his rod hateth his son: but he that loveth him chasteneth him betimes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justus comedit et replet animam suam ;  venter autem impiorum insaturabilis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַדִּ֗יק אֹ֭כֵֽל לְשֹׂ֣בַע נַפְשׁ֑וֹ וּבֶ֖טֶן רְשָׁעִ֣ים תֶּחְסָֽר׃
verses.king_james: The righteous eateth to the satisfying of his soul: but the belly of the wicked shall want.
